Socket Browser

A minimal macOS browser. Ad-hoc signed, updated via Sparkle with EdDSA-verified signatures.

Install

One-line install, no Gatekeeper prompts, no manual xattr:

Stable

/bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://harshach.github.io/Socket/install.sh)"

Nightly

SOCKET_CHANNEL=nightly /bin/bash -c "$(curl -fsSL https://harshach.github.io/Socket/install.sh)"

The script fetches the latest DMG from GitHub Releases, drops Socket.app into /Applications, clears macOS quarantine attributes, and launches the app. After that, Sparkle auto-updates take over — no re-install needed.

Manual install (if you'd rather download the DMG)

Grab the latest DMG from Releases, drag Socket.app to /Applications, then run:

sudo xattr -cr /Applications/Socket.app

Then right-click → Open on Socket.app and confirm the Gatekeeper prompt. The install.sh script above does all of this automatically.

Update feeds

  • Stable channel
  • Nightly channel
  • install.sh (source)
